Image originally from cultist simulator and in [[Catgirl Simulator]] used for one of the [[Nine aspects]] [[Category:Nine aspects]]
[[sn:Forge.svg]][[Category:Ego loosening]]
[[sn:File:Forge.svg]][[sn:File:Forge.svg]][[Category:Gnosis]]
[[sn:File:Forge.svg]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
